case_title: LUIS ALFREDO PICAZO VS. JUN YAO WEI et al

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, *JUDGMENT DEBTOR PAID JUDGMENT - BY CHECK - FULLY THRU COURT* AS TO DEFENDANT WEI, JUN YAO CHAN, LUCINDN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY PICAZO, LUIS ALFREDO AS TO DEFENDANT WEI, JUN YAO CHAN, LUCINDN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-2012 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $800.00 RE 31425 FOR TRANSACTION W0613102D002 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO LUIS ALFREDO PICAZO, DOC #1905057923, WARRANT #38202579, DATED FEB-08-2013

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2012 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-03-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-03-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. BOTH DEFENDANTS WAIVE SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER--GUADALUPE PICAZO. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER--LUCINDN CHAN. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM.
